'''Red 6''' was a [[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|T-65 X-wing starfighter]] in service to the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. It was assigned to [[Red Squadron (Rebel Alliance)/Legends|Red Squadron]]<ref name="CCG-Red6" /> and stationed at the [[Great Temple/Legends|Rebel base]] on [[Yavin 4/Legends|Yavin 4]].<ref name="ANH" /> Red 6 was [[Pilot/Legends|piloted]] by [[Jek Tono Porkins/Legends|Jek Porkins]]<ref name="CCG-Red6" /> with [[R5-D8/Legends|R5-D8]] as the craft's [[Astromech droid/Legends|astromech droid]].<ref name="Power" /> Prior to the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], the craft skipped its most recent inspection of its [[Computer/Legends|computer]] and [[Flight computer/Legends|flight control systems]]. During the Battle of Yavin, Porkins made several successful strafing attacks on the [[DS-1 Orbital Battle Station/Legends|Death Star]] with Red 6.<ref name="CCG-Red6" /> 

During the battle, Red 6 was hit by debris causing a cascade of malfunctions in the fighter's computer and flight control systems.<ref name="CCG-Problem">{{CCG|set=Premiere Limited|cardname=I've Got A Problem Here}}</ref> The systems returned incorrect information, leaving Porkins unable to judge his altitude. The fighter ended up too low to the surface of the Death Star and was an easy target for [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Turbolaser/Legends|turbolasers]].<ref name="ANH novel">[[Star Wars: A New Hope (novelization)|''Star Wars Episode IV: A New Hope'' novelization]]</ref> Porkins was unable to regain control and Red 6 was hit by enemy fire, destroying it.<ref name="ANH" />
